title: Have you met any of the voice actors or actresses
display_title: Have you met any of the voice actors or actresses
wikitext:
[]: Have you met any of the voice actors or actresses?             Quote Post by Vampire Killer » Sun Apr 27, 2008 11:52 am Me? Two weeks ago, I got the chance to meet Tiffany Grant and Yuko Miyamura at Kawaii Kon 2008. I got those two to sign my End of Evangelion DVD. Have you met any of the voice actors or actresses?

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Sun Apr 27, 2008 1:36 pm Zeak recently met Spike at a convention and got his autograph and his views on RE-take.

[]:             Quote Post by Vampire Killer » Sun Apr 27, 2008 2:11 pm I hope Spike comes to next year's Kawaii Kon.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Sun Apr 27, 2008 2:42 pm well, just a word of warning to the n00bs of EGF, most people here never took very kindly to the likes of Grant or Lee (Tiffany and Amanda Win, NOT Ulysses or Robert ) same for Matt Greenfield

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Sun Apr 27, 2008 4:40 pm there's nothing wrong with them as far as i'm sure they're nice folk. i mean there is a big difference between grant sucks and grants portrayal of Asuka sucks.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sun Apr 27, 2008 4:45 pm As long as i live in Greece, i WILL NEVER have a chance to do so, but cool for you.

[]:             Quote Post by mrpanda » Sun Apr 27, 2008 5:38 pm the_seventh_child wrote: As long as i live in Greece, i WILL NEVER have a chance to do so, but cool for you.

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka's Plug Suit » Sun Apr 27, 2008 8:36 pm THE Hal E. Burton 9000 wrote: well, just a word of warning to the n00bs of EGF, most people here never took very kindly to the likes of Grant or Lee (Tiffany and Amanda Win, NOT Ulysses or Robert ) same for Matt Greenfield

[]: Re: Have you met any of the voice actors or actresses?             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Apr 27, 2008 8:42 pm Vampire Killer wrote: I got the chance to meet Tiffany Grant and Yuko Miyamura at Kawaii Kon 2008. I got those two to sign my End of Evangelion DVD.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Apr 27, 2008 8:47 pm Yuko Miyamura was there??? O_O Anything about Rebuild? Were the two together/did anything together?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Apr 27, 2008 9:30 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Were the two together/did anything together?

[]:             Quote Post by V » Sun Apr 27, 2008 9:50 pm can you type up a full report of what Grant and others associated with Eva were doing/happenings at KawaiiCon in a separate thread?

[]:             Quote Post by Vampire Killer » Sun Apr 27, 2008 10:33 pm Well, I was at a panel where Tiffany interviewed Yuko w/ her personal translator and then they moved on to Q & A with the fans. As for Rebuild, I think they only mentioned that Yuko has been working on it recently. To be honest, I can't remember everything that happened, sorry folks.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Apr 28, 2008 6:09 pm That's alright, it's just cool you were there. @ Reichu: Yeah. Grant was probably nearly going into cardiac arrest due to being near Miyamuara. ;)

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Apr 28, 2008 7:22 pm Reichu wrote: NAveryW wrote: Congratulations; with Tiffany Grant's signature, the DVD's value has now plummeted to almost nothing.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Tue Apr 29, 2008 8:12 am Vampire Killer wrote: Well, I was at a panel where Tiffany interviewed Yuko w/ her personal translator and then they moved on to Q & A with the fans. As for Rebuild, I think they only mentioned that Yuko has been working on it recently. To be honest, I can't remember everything that happened, sorry folks.

[]:             Quote Post by Vampire Killer » Tue Apr 29, 2008 11:34 am can't you remember any of the Q&A?

[]:             Quote Post by Apathetic Piggy » Tue Apr 29, 2008 12:39 pm I'm not much of a con-goer myself, and I don't know if I really would like to meet any of the voice actors in particular. Would be interesting to, but I wouldn't go out of my way. And while the entire subject of Grant's seemingly reverse Midas touch, the concept of Spike Spencer knowing about (and potentially having read)RE-Take strikes me as hilarious. I wonder what else of that nature he'd read. It's the first I've heard of it, so sorry if that's old news or anything. It could be that someone informed him of what it was, but even so, I imagine that it'd still be an interesting conversation. Cheers.

[]:             Quote Post by mrpanda » Tue Apr 29, 2008 3:43 pm V wrote: can you type up a full report of what Grant and others associated with Eva were doing/happenings at KawaiiCon in a separate thread?

[]:             Quote Post by universalperson » Tue Apr 29, 2008 10:43 pm DId you mean Retake, or Rebuild? DIfference people. One's a fan comic. One is more official.

Two weeks ago, I got the chance to meet Tiffany Grant and Yuko Miyamura at Kawaii Kon 2008. I got those two to sign my End of Evangelion DVD. Have you met any of the voice actors or actresses?
